overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a sunlit castle courtyard toward a massive Gothic building, then entering a grand interior hall. The video features detailed stone architecture, manicured gardens with fountains, and transitions from warm golden-hour outdoor lighting to a dimmer, atmospheric interior with marble staircases.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with curved cobblestone pathways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved cobblestone path toward the distant castle, passing ornate lamp posts and manicured hedges

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the path in the background

entered.detail: massive Gothic stone castle with multiple spires and tall windows dominating the background
low stone wall running along the right side of the path with greenery behind it
decorative black iron street lamp with glass enclosure
tall pointed spire visible above the tree line in the distance
neatly trimmed green hedges lining the pathway
weathered stone cobblestones forming the curved walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved cobblestone path in a wide-open castle courtyard during golden hour. The massive Gothic castle dominates the center background, while manicured hedges and ornate iron lamp posts line the path. A distant figure walks along the path ahead, and the warm sunlight casts long shadows across the stones.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle entrance courtyard with garden benches and fountain

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the main entrance, passing seated figures on stone benches and approaching the large wooden doors flanked by griffin statues

notable_agents.action: seated on stone bench next to potted red flowers, facing the path
seated on bench near the building wall, engaged in conversation or rest

entered.detail: multi-level circular stone fountain with water basin
stone bench with ornate carved details for seating
large terracotta pots with vibrant red blooming flowers
massive double doors made of dark wood with metal studs and ring handles
large bronze statue of a winged griffin on stone pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more enclosed garden courtyard, passing a tiered stone fountain on the left and NPCs seated on benches to the right. The castle facade looms larger as the character approaches the massive wooden entrance door flanked by imposing bronze griffin statues. Potted red flowers add color to the stone surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with twin marble staircases and statues

events.description: character opens the large wooden entrance door and steps into the castle interior

agents.ego_description: opening the heavy wooden door, stepping into the grand hall, and walking toward the center while observing the marble architecture

notable_agents.action: figure standing on the upper left marble staircase landing

entered.detail: sweeping marble staircase with ornate balustrade leading to upper level
matching marble staircase on the right side of the hall
large framed portrait hanging on the wall above the interior door
recessed niches in the stone walls containing standing statues
arched wooden door at the far end of the hall with metal fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character opens the massive wooden door and enters a grand hall with soaring ceilings. Twin marble staircases sweep up on either side, and stone niches containing statues line the walls. A large portrait hangs above the far door. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural window light and interior illumination, creating an atmospheric, solemn ambiance. A figure stands on the upper left staircase observing the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit castle courtyard that gradually narrows as it approaches the massive Gothic entrance. It begins on a curved cobblestone path under the warm glow of golden hour, where manicured hedges and ornate iron lamp posts frame a distant view of the dominating castle. As the character advances, the open space shifts into a more enclosed garden courtyard, passing a tiered stone fountain and NPCs resting on benches. The scene then tightens as the camera moves past vibrant potted red flowers, bringing the imposing castle facade into sharp focus. Finally, the movement culminates at the massive wooden entrance doors, which are flanked by towering bronze griffin statues.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from the bright outdoors into the solemn atmosphere of a grand interior hall. It begins with the opening of massive wooden doors, which reveals a vast space defined by soaring ceilings and a shift toward dim, atmospheric lighting. As the camera moves forward, the view expands to show twin marble staircases sweeping upward on either side, flanked by stone niches containing statues. The scene then draws the eye toward a large portrait hanging above the far door, while a figure on the upper left staircase observes the entrance from above.
